sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, date_string VARCHAR(10), num_value INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, date_string, num_value) VALUES (1, '2023-04-15', 524288), (2, 'INVALID_DATE', NULL), (3, '', 0);
SELECT id, regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS date_parts FROM test_table WHERE id << 1 = 2;
SELECT id, (regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) << 1) AS shifted_value FROM test_table WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, (regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) IS NOT NULL) AS is_valid_date FROM test_table) AS subquery HAVING is_valid_date = TRUE;
CREATE TEMP TABLE derived_table AS SELECT id, date_string, num_value << 2 AS shifted_num FROM test_table WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT dt.id, regexp_extract(dt.date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']), dt.shifted_num FROM derived_table dt JOIN test_table t ON dt.id = t.id WHERE dt.shifted_num > 100;
SELECT id, (regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) << 3) AS complex_shift FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING complex_shift IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN new_column VARCHAR(255);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, date_string, num_value, new_column) VALUES (4, '2021-01-01', 1, NULL), (5, '2022-12-31', 2, 'Valid Entry');

SELECT id, regexp_extract(date_string, '(\d+)-(\d+)-(\d+)', ['y', 'm', 'd']) AS parts, (num_value << 2) AS shifted_info FROM test_table WHERE new_column IS NULL OR new_column = 'Valid Entry' ORDER BY id;
